dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c Ravi Bishnoi b Archer 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: oh, hello, and goodbye! Abhishek goes after it first-ball, and Abhishek bites the dust! Banged in on middle and leg. Nips away a touch and Abhishek hares down the track. Throws the kitchen sink at it but only manages a slice. The ball lobs a mile up and Bishnoi does the rest at deep backward point. Stunned silence in Hyderabad!

dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c Ferreira b Parag 18 (18b 3x4 0x6 32m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: Head falls, and Parag's ploy to bring himself on has worked a charm! Slowed up on a length just outside leg. Head skips down but is cramped for room. Not to the pitch of the ball either, meaning that he gets no power on his lofted stroke. Chips it down Ferreira's throat, and RR continue to tighten the screws!

dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c & b Sandeep Sharma 91 (44b 8x4 6x6 67m) SR: 206.81

dismissalComment.html: skewed straight up, and there is a slight collision. Catch taken eventually, though! Back of a length outside off. Kishan has a mow across the line and loses his shape completely. No distance at all on it. The bowler and the keeper both go for it. They bump into each other but Sandeep keeps his palms clasped around the ball. Another marvellous Kishan knock, but he has to go with more than six overs left in the innings!

dismissalText.commentary: Heinrich Klaasen c Parag b Deshpande 40 (26b 1x4 3x6 51m) SR: 153.84

dismissalComment.html: straight to extra cover, and Deshpande's impressive IPL continues! Back of a length and hung up wide outside off. Klaasen has to reach out significantly but in that process, he cannot generate the power or the elevation he wants. Picks out Parag to perfection, and Klaasen is livid with himself as he storms off!

dismissalText.commentary: Nitish Kumar Reddy c †Jurel b Archer 28 (13b 0x4 4x6 29m) SR: 215.38

dismissalComment.html: nicked and gone! Nitish's party is over, and Archer has another wicket! Seems like a slower ball, bashed into the track outside off. Nitish swings at it with abandon and gets a healthy edge that is gobbled up by Jurel. No celebration from Archer. An air of frustration if anything, and the ground turns silent again!

dismissalText.commentary: Aniket Verma run out (†Jurel/Deshpande) 6 (5b 1x4 0x6 8m) SR: 120

dismissalComment.html: more confusion in the middle, and a run-out has finally occurred! Full toss wide outside off. Arora swings at it and misses. This time, Verma scampers down for the single, only to be sent back. Deshpande receives the throw from his keeper and under-arms it into the stumps, with Verma stranded!

dismissalComment.html: goes straight up, and Hinge has outwitted the 15-year-old! What a dream start for Hinge. His first game in the IPL. And he bashes this into the track on middle and leg.
